what: Download plant specimen records from REFLORA Virtual Herbarium — reflora_download

text: Download plant specimen records Darwin Core Format herbarium collection Herbário Virtual REFLORA hosted Rio de Janeiro Botanical Garden.

title: Download plant specimen records from REFLORA Virtual Herbarium — reflora_download
Download plant specimen records from REFLORA Virtual Herbarium — reflora_download
text: herbarium vector specific herbarium acronyms (collection code) uppercase letters leave NULL download records REFLORA herbaria. verbose Logical, FALSE, message showing steps downloading herbarium specimen records printed console full. dir Pathway computer's directory, file saved. default create directory named **reflora_download** results saved within subfolder named searched REFLORA-associated herbarium collection.

title: Download plant specimen records from REFLORA Virtual Herbarium — reflora_download

code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{  reflora_download(herbarium = c("ALCB", "HUEFS", "K", "RB", "US"),                  verbose = TRUE,                  dir = "downloaded_reflora") } # }

title: Summarize current plant specimen records at REFLORA Virtual Herbarium — reflora_summary
code: reflora_summary(herbarium = NULL,                 verbose = TRUE,                 save = TRUE,                 dir = "reflora_summary")

title: Summarize current plant specimen records at REFLORA Virtual Herbarium — reflora_summary
text: herbarium vector specific herbarium acronyms (collection code) uppercase letters leave NULL summarize specimen records REFLORA-hosted herbaria. verbose Logical, FALSE, message showing steps summarizing specimen records printed console full. save Logical, TRUE, search results saved disk. dir Pathway computer's directory, table-formatted summary saved. default create directory named **reflora_summary**.
